input.source: console output of create_measurements.py, cross-checked against `ls -lh data/weather_stations.csv`

scope_note: Only the fast implementations were re-run at full 1B-row scale in this session (DuckDB, PyArrow, Polars lazy) — user decision, to avoid the slow stdlib/pandas paths that already take 12-24 min each on comparable hardware. Their numbers in the README's 'Historical benchmark' table are preserved from the original run, not reproduced here.

results.source: journalctl -k: 'Out of memory: Killed process 359924 (python) ... anon-rss:13123184kB', matches the historical README's own note that Polars eager/lazy did not complete in a 16 GiB environment

dashboard_mart.built_from: measurements_duckdb.csv (the only implementation that completed and whose output create_station_metrics_mart.py reads)
